name: Wuhan, China
label: Wuhan University / B.S. in GIS
summary: Undergraduate education at Wuhan University, earning B.S. in Geographic Information System.

name: Santa Barbara, California
label: UC Santa Barbara / Graduate Studies
summary: M.A. and Ph.D. in Geography from UCSB, specializing in Cartography, GIS, and Cognitive Science.

summary: Postdoctoral Scholar at Stanford Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, Department of Computer Science.

summary: Assistant Professor at UGA Geography, affiliated with Computer Science and AI Institute. Received AAG Nystrom Award in 2023.

name: Austin, Texas

summary: Assistant Professor at UT Austin Geography and the Environment, directing the SEAI Lab. Also Visiting Faculty at Google Research.
